llm_recommendations.reason_for_recommendation: Prodded to diversify markets over a 10-year period, reduce over-dependence on North America and foreign tech platforms for strategic autonomy.

Sold 100% equity stake in its wholly owned subsidiary Royal Challengers Sports Private Limited (RCSPL) for Rs 16,660 crore in an all-cash deal.
Led a high-profile consortium to acquire the Royal Challengers Bengaluru (RCB) franchise for Rs 16,660 crore.
Bought liquefied petroleum gas (LPG) from Iran for the first time in almost eight years to avert a worsening domestic shortage.
Will share a shipment of Iranian LPG to help avert a worsening domestic cooking fuel shortage.
